intended_use: DeepXray is a radiological fully automated image processing software device of either computed (CR) or directly digital (DX) images intended to aid medical professionals in the measurement of minimum
intended_use_full: DeepXray is a radiological fully automated image processing software device of either computed (CR) or directly digital (DX) images intended to aid medical professionals in the measurement of minimum joint space width; the assessment of the presence or absence of sclerosis, joint space narrowing, and osteophytes based on OARSI criteria for these parameters; and, the presence or absence of radiographic knee OA based on Kellgren & Lawrence Grading of standing, fixed-flexion radiographs of the knee.
ground_truth: Ground truth labels established by multiple physicians following adjudication procedures in the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI) study for Kellgren-Lawrence grades, OARSI criteria grades (osteophyte, sclerosis, joint space narrowing), and measurements of minimum joint space width and femoral-tibial angle
other_metrics: Orthogonal linear regression for measurements: Medial mJSW slope 1.02 (95% CI 1.00, 1.03), intercept 0.04 (-0.03, 0.11); Lateral mJSW slope 0.98 (95% CI 0.95, 1.01), intercept 0.06 (-0.10, 0.26); Femoral-Tibial Angle slope 0.97 (95% CI 0.96, 0.99), intercept -0.10 (-0.17, -0.04)
